title: Our Dream School Clubs
passage: Wei Fang and Liu Lin are the students of Green School. They are good friends. They want to join some clubs. There are many clubs in their school. They are the English club, the music club, the swimming club, the chess club, the art club and so on. Wei Fang wants to join the music club. She wants to be a musician when she grows up(长大). She can sing and dance. Now she can play the piano and play the guitar well, but she can't play the violin. Liu Lin can play chess and he can swim well. But he can only speak a little English. So he wants to join the English club to improve(提高)his English. On Sundays, he often plays basketball with his friends. He wants to be a basketball player.

questions.prompt: Who wants to be a musician?
What club does Liu Lin want to join?
When does Liu Lin play basketball with his friends?
What club do you want to join? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: I want to join the music club to learn more instruments.
Because I love playing the piano and want to be a musician like Wei Fang.
It is a wonderful way to relax and make my school life more colorful.
I want to join the sports club to play basketball every day.
Because I can speak a little English and swim well.
In a word, doing well in school subjects is the most important thing.
